description: §41.16.6 — a struct field whose declared type is itself a :struct (e.g. `address: Address`) with no explicit `<column field="address">` slot override fires E-TABLEFOR-NESTED-STRUCT-NO-SLOT. `User` has `{ id, name, address: Address }`; `address` has no slot. Auto-recurse into nested struct fields is out-of-scope for v1.0 (mirror formFor §41.14.8 OQ-FF-11 v1.0 disposition). (Incidental W-PROGRAM-001 + W-STDLIB-SEED-FAILCLOSED co-fire, as in the sibling table-for cases; superset match.)
rationale: §41.16.6 E-TABLEFOR-NESTED-STRUCT-NO-SLOT: a struct-typed field with no explicit `<column field="X">` slot override has no v1.0 default rendering. Resolution: provide a `<column field="address">` slot body that renders the nested struct, OR exclude the field via `omit=["address"]`.
